detailedSummary: The candidate failed to submit any code for the given problem statement ('Serialize and Deserialize Binary Tree'). Furthermore, the candidate only shared their screen for a very brief period (approximately 4 seconds, from 0:13 to 0:17 in the video), showing a basic Java class structure, before stopping the screen share. For the majority of the interview duration where coding would typically occur, the screen was not shared. Without any submitted code or a continuous screen share showing the candidate's thought process and coding attempts, it is impossible to evaluate their technical skills for the given problem. The lack of submitted code and failure to maintain screen sharing are critical deficiencies for a technical interview, especially for a Software Engineer I role where basic coding and problem-solving abilities are expected.
